name: UroGen Pharma Ltd.
business: UroGen Pharma Ltd. is a biotechnology company that develops and commercializes innovative solutions for treating urothelial and specialty cancers. It has developed RTGel reverse-thermal hydrogel technology and markets approved products Jelmyto and Zusduri. Jelmyto is for low-grade upper tract urothelial cancer, and Zusduri is for recurrent low-grade intermediate risk non-muscle invasive bladder cancer.

exposures.sentence: We are a biotechnology company dedicated to developing and commercializing innovative solutions that treat urothelial and specialty cancers.

catalysts.sentence: On June 12, 2025, the FDA approved our NDA for Zusduri (mitomycin) for intravesical solution, formerly known as UGN-102, for the treatment of adults with recurrent low-grade intermediate risk NMIBC.
We anticipate submitting an NDA for UGN-103 in the second half of 2026 with potential FDA approval in 2027.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of enrollment in Phase 3 trial of UGN-104
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete enrollment in the Phase 3 trial of UGN-104 by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical study for UGN-501
catalysts.sentence: Our development plan for UGN-501 is advancing and IND-enabling studies are currently ongoing, with the goal of initiating a Phase 1 clinical study by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Entered into second amended and restated loan agreement with Pharmakon
catalysts.sentence: On February 26, 2026, we entered into a second amended and restated loan agreement with Pharmakon providing for a senior secured term loan facility of up to $250.0 million, consisting of two tranches.
In October 2025, Zusduri was assigned a unique, permanent Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) J-code (J9282) by CMS, which subsequently became effective on January 1, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Annual treatable population of low-grade intermediate risk NMIBC in the US is approximately 82,000 patients (23,000 newly diagnosed, 59,000 recurrent).
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that the annual treatable population of low-grade intermediate risk NMIBC in the United States is approximately 82,000, of which approximately 23,000 are estimated to be newly diagnosed and 59,000 are estimated to be recurrent patients.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market opportunity for Zusduri in recurrent low-grade intermediate risk NMIBC is potentially over $5.0 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that the total addressable market opportunity for Zusduri in recurrent low-grade intermediate risk NMIBC is potentially over $5.0 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Estimated annual incidence of UTUC in the US is up to 7,000 cases, accounting for 5% to 10% of all new urothelial cancer cases.
tamClaims.sentence: Low-grade UTUC accounts for approximately 5% to 10% of all new cases of urothelial cancer, which together with recurrent cases, results in an estimated annual incidence in the United States of up to 7,000 cases.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 40% of UTUC patients annually in the US have low-grade UTUC.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 40% of the patients diagnosed annually with UTUC in the United States have low-grade UTUC.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 18,700 BCG-unresponsive NMIBC patients in the US annually.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate based upon a review of peer-reviewed and publicly available data that there are approximately 18,700 BCG-unresponsive patients in the United States annually.
